series_metadata.series_title: Applications, Renewal Card: Completed and Returned
series_metadata.series_description: Renewal application cards and applications submitted by persons seeking to have a license or certificate renewed.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; then destroy.; If not scanned, retain for 75 years, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain for 75 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
